name: auth_failures_by_user
description: Count of authentication failures grouped by user (used in phase 1 ingestion parity).
splunk_spl: search index=auth action=failure | stats count by user
shieldops_nl: Show count of authentication failures grouped by user in the time window

name: cloudtrail_event_count
description: Total CloudTrail event count for the window.
shieldops_nl: Total count of CloudTrail events in the time window

name: crowdstrike_detections_hourly
description: CrowdStrike detections bucketed per hour (validates streaming connector parity).
splunk_spl: search index=crowdstrike sourcetype=crowdstrike:detection | bucket _time span=1h | stats count by _time
shieldops_nl: Show CrowdStrike detections grouped by hour in the time window

name: okta_admin_signins
description: Successful admin sign-ins from Okta (high-value identity event).
splunk_spl: search index=okta eventType=user.session.start outcome.result=SUCCESS actor.alternateId=*admin* | stats count by actor.alternateId
shieldops_nl: Show successful Okta admin sign-ins grouped by actor

name: k8s_audit_privileged_exec
description: Privileged container exec calls from Kubernetes audit logs.
splunk_spl: search index=k8s sourcetype=kube:apiserver:audit verb=create objectRef.subresource=exec | stats count by user.username
shieldops_nl: Show Kubernetes privileged exec actions grouped by user
